name: 吴昌华
title: 院长
bio: 吴昌华长期从事气候治理、绿色金融与系统转型研究，是全球气候学院创始人。
bioEn: Wu Changhua has long worked on climate governance, green finance, and system transition. Founder of Global Climate Academy.
